issue_body_preview: SQL validation was not getting triggered when using `Cmd/Ctrl + Enter`. This is because `handleSubmit` function was registered only once while mounting the Monaco editor at which point the query validation is still not fully initialized. Also, put `getLimitOffset` in `try/catch` so it doesn't throw
test_description_zh: 在 Explorer 页面的 Monaco SQL 编辑器中输入一条无效的 SQL 查询语句，然后使用快捷键 Cmd/Ctrl + Enter 提交查询，观察是否触发了 SQL 验证逻辑并显示相应的错误提示。
expected_result_zh: 使用 Cmd/Ctrl + Enter 快捷键提交查询时，应正确触发 SQL 验证，对无效的 SQL 查询显示相应的错误/验证提示信息，而不是跳过验证直接执行或抛出未捕获的异常。
